text.title: business-storytelling Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for business-storytelling as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Burying the main recommendation at the end after extensive background.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Decision-makers who stop reading mid-document never receive the recommendation. Lead with the answer per Pyramid Principle.

failure-mode.description: Ending a presentation without a specific call to action.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Vague endings produce "let me think about it" deferrals. A clear ask defines what decision is being requested and when.
